description_long: This is a large, single-story bungalow with a sprawling, multi-wing layout set on a rectangular plot with green lawns and intersecting stone pathways. The structure features a combination of wood and stone exterior walls, with a prominent dark gabled roof that extends over several sections, creating sheltered porches and entryways. Multiple chimneys are visible, suggesting several fireplaces inside. The front facade is characterized by wide windows and a covered porch supported by wooden columns, while the side and rear wings have additional windows and smaller covered areas. The building sits on a stone foundation, and the surrounding grounds are neatly landscaped with grass and walkways. The overall design is reminiscent of Craftsman-style bungalows, emphasizing natural materials and horizontal lines.
description: A sprawling, single-story Craftsman-style bungalow with a dark gabled roof, wood and stone exterior, wide windows, and covered porches set on landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide windows, and a prominent covered porch with wooden columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended wing, additional windows, and the continuation of the gabled roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple wings, smaller covered areas, and a clear view of the stone foundation and back windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the garage or secondary entrance, visible porch, and intersecting walkways.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
